title: Opening for Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
